About Bianca

Art is one's way of expressions of emotions, thoughts and imagination. But sometimes it does mean hitting a wall or a short pause from time to time, to allow our human brains to come up with even better ideas and let the inspiration take control.

It may be 3D figures one day, charcoal and an easel the next, gouache spread across a full sheet the day after that. This Gallery is a fignant of my imagination and I hope you enjoy my work!.

Also it does help if you listen to Billie Eilish while you make art!

— keep making things, B.
